message:
fix: clippy pedantic/nursery cleanup across workspace

- fsqlite-core/commit_marker.rs: allow cast_possible_truncation in tests
- fsqlite-harness/perf_loop.rs: fix items_after_statements, drain→into_iter,
  format_push_string→writeln!, case-sensitive extension comparison, too_many_lines
- fsqlite-harness/spec_to_beads_audit.rs: rename issue_type→kind (struct field
  prefix lint), fix similar names, items_after_statements, redundant closure
- fsqlite-harness/tests: fix float_cmp, similar_names, raw string hashes,
  cast_possible_truncation, needless_pass_by_value, cast_lossless
- fsqlite-mvcc/physical_merge.rs: fix assigning_clones, similar_names,
  single_match_else→if let, items_after_statements, cast_possible_truncation
- fsqlite-harness/tests/tuple_generator_verification.rs: fix slice→to_vec()

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
